name: 3D Moon Lamp – Rechargeable Night Light
description: Glowing 3D‑printed moon lamp with multicolor LED touch control, perfect for bedroom decor or romantic gifting.

name: Personalized Photo Mug
description: Ceramic mug customized with your photo or name, ideal for birthdays, anniversaries, and office gifting.

name: Wooden Photo Frame with Name
description: Natural wooden frame where you can add your photo plus a custom name or short message for loved ones.

name: LED Message Board Lamp
description: Acrylic LED lamp with a writable surface where you can write notes or romantic messages.

name: Personalized Photo Cushion Cover
description: Soft cushion cover printed with your chosen photo, great for sofa, bed, or couple‑gift sets.

name: Engraved Wooden Keychain
description: Minimal wooden keychain with one‑line engraving, perfect as a pocket‑friendly gift for friends or partners.

name: Rotating Rose Teddy Box
description: Elegant box with a rotating artificial rose, LED light, and a cute teddy bear for romantic occasions.

name: 3D Photo Crystal Cube
description: Glass‑like cube with laser‑engraved 3D photo, ideal as a desk or anniversary gift.

name: Personalized Diary / Notebook
description: A5‑size notebook with custom cover text or name, great for students, professionals, and travel lovers.

name: Personalized Canvas Print
description: High‑quality photo printed on canvas, framed or unframed, for family portraits or couple art.

name: Desk Organizer with Pen Holder
description: Wooden desk tray to organize pens, notebooks, and small office items, ideal for corporate gifting.

name: Aromatherapy Candle Gift Set
description: Soy‑wax scented candles in lavender, vanilla, or sandalwood, delivered in a premium gift box.

name: Mini Succulent Plant Set
description: Set of 3–5 small indoor succulents in cute pots, perfect for office desks or new‑home gifts.

name: Personalized T‑Shirt
description: Cotton t‑shirt with custom text or photo print, great for couples, friends, and family groups.

name: LED Phone Stand with Light
description: Adjustable phone stand with built‑in LED light, perfect for studying, watching videos, or night‑time use.

name: Personalized Love Puzzle Box
description: 100–200‑piece photo puzzle made from a couple or family collage, designed as a fun keepsake.

name: LED Digital Photo Frame
description: Small digital frame that auto‑flips between photos, perfect for parents or grandparents.

name: Van Gogh Wall Art Print
description: Framed or poster‑style art print of Van Gogh paintings, ideal for room or office decor.

name: Chocolate Snack Gift Hamper
description: Curated gift box with chocolates, cookies, and dry fruits, great for birthdays and festivals.

name: Personalized Office Tumbler
description: Insulated stainless‑steel tumbler with name or logo, suitable for office, gym, or travel.

name: Couple Keychain Set
description: Matching pair of engraved metal keychains for couples, best friends, or siblings.

name: Caricature Illustration Digital Print
description: Hand‑drawn cartoon portrait delivered as a digital print or PDF, perfect for birthdays and anniversaries.

name: Personalized Welcome Door Sign

name: Personalized Spotify Art Frame
